intensity.title: Intensity Legend
intensity.descMuitoAlta: Exceeds match demand · Short SSG · >90% HRmax

calculator.title: FIELD CALCULATOR
calculator.subtitle: Dimensions by format and group. ApP calculated based on field players (excl. GK and floaters).
calculator.sobreApPDesc: Area per Player is calculated by dividing total area only by field players. Goalkeepers and floaters are excluded because they occupy functionally distinct spaces during play.
calculator.semCorrespondencia: No strong match in the table — using generic model
calculator.grupoNaoSelecionado: No group selected — showing average reference (Group B)
calculator.classificacaoApP: Classification based on absolute ApP ({app} m²) — select SSG/MSG/LSG for target-relative analysis
calculator.classificacaoRelativa: Based on {classif} • Target ApP: {alvo} m², current: {atual} m² • Target players: {jogAlvo}, current: {jogAtual}

prescription.title: HIIT Prescription
prescription.modeloGenericoDesc: Game classification defines the framework; group defines dose progression/regression.

classif.descSSG: Higher interaction density, greater neuromuscular load and anaerobic contribution
classif.descMSG: Intermediate stimulus, may favour neuromuscular load or high-speed exposure
classif.descLSG: Greater high-speed running exposure and longer displacements, higher aerobic contribution

load.descSemEstimulo: Well below target — insufficient stimulus for adaptation
load.descLeve: Below target — stimulus present but low
load.descBom: Range consistent with the game-type objective

manipulation.title: MANIPULATION VARIABLES
manipulation.subtitle: Physiological effects of small-sided game manipulation variables

methodology.title: Methodological note:
methodology.text: Area per Player (ApP = m² / number of field players) is calculated based on outfield players only, excluding goalkeepers and floaters, as they occupy functionally distinct spaces. Total participants should be considered separately for field logistics.

pwa.instalarMsg: Install the app for offline access.

refTable.title: REFERENCE: ApP (AREA PER PLAYER) TO REPLICATE MATCH DEMANDS
refTable.fontes: Sources: Casamichana, Bradley & Castellano (PLOS ONE, 2020); Clemente et al. (2023); Rodríguez-Fernández et al. (2024)

refTableData.variavel: Very high speed running VHSR (>21 km·h⁻¹)

footer.text: Small-Sided Games Prescription by V{sub}30-15{/sub}IFT · Evidence-based
